---
title: "Load_16S"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-20"
---

#### Load 16S amplicon sequence data from qza files in the directory written in "path_qm" in "scripts/path.R". The data is imported using the "qiime2R" package, which allows for seamless integration of QIIME 2 artifacts into R for downstream analysis.

<details><summary>Settings and preps</summary><div>

```{r}
# Load necessary libraries
library(tidyverse)
# Load the 16S amplicon sequence data from the specified directory
# The path to the qza files is defined in "path_qm" in "scripts
source("../scripts/path.R")
```

</div></details>
